title: 🔹We are opening the market for recruiting foreigners to strengthen...
title_en: 🔹We are opening the market for recruiting foreigners to strengthen...
title_uk: 🔹Ми відкриваємо ринок для набору іноземців для посилення...
description: 🔹We are opening the market for recruiting foreigners to strengthen combat units and save the lives of Ukrainian soldiers. Our goal is to fill up to 30–50% of the positions of stormtroopers and infantrymen with foreigners. 🔹One more key question. Justice for those who have been in the Defense Forces the longest and have spent the most time in combat. For them, by the end of the year, we will begin gradual dismissal from service. This is just the first stage...
description_en: 🔹We are opening the market for recruiting foreigners to strengthen combat units and save the lives of Ukrainian soldiers. Our goal is to fill up to 30–50% of the positions of stormtroopers and infantrymen with foreigners. 🔹One more key question. Justice for those who have been in the Defense Forces the longest and have spent the most time in combat. For them, by the end of the year, we will begin gradual dismissal from service. This is just the first stage...
description_uk: 🔹Відкриваємо ринок рекрутингу іноземців для підсилення бойових підрозділів та збереження життів українських військових. Наша мета — до 30–50% посад штурмовиків та піхотинців заповнити іноземцями. 🔹⁠Ще одне ключове питання. Справедливість для тих, хто найдовше в Силах оборони та провів найбільше часу на бойових. Для них до кінця року починаємо поступове звільнення зі служби. Це лише перший етап...

title: Fedorov disclosed the details of the army reform. According to him,...

description: Fedorov disclosed the details of the army reform. According to him, the first package of decisions has already been approved by the government. Three types of contracts will appear. For assault infantry - 10-14 months, for UAV operators, gunners, EW specialists and other combat specialties - 24 months, for other forward services - also 24 months. After the end of the contract, they promise a guaranteed delay, which will be...
description_en: Fedorov disclosed the details of the army reform. According to him, the first package of decisions has already been approved by the government. Three types of contracts will appear. For assault infantry - 10-14 months, for UAV operators, gunners, EW specialists and other combat specialties - 24 months, for other forward services - also 24 months. After the end of the contract, they promise a guaranteed delay, which will be...
description_uk: Федоров раскрыл детали реформы армии По его словам, первый пакет решений уже утвердило правительство. Появятся три типа контрактов. Для штурмовой пехоты - 10-14 месяцев, для операторов БПЛА, артиллеристов, специалистов РЭБ и других боевых специальностей - 24 месяца, для остальных направлений службы - тоже 24 месяца. После завершения контракта обещают гарантированную отсрочку, которая будет...

For comparison: in the ranking of the world's richest people, the second place is occupied by...

For comparison: in the ranking of the world's richest people, the second place is occupied by...

Компания привлекла $75 млрд, проведя крупнейшее размещение акций в истории США. Основная часть капитала Маска сейчас приходится именно на SpaceX, доля в которой оценивается примерно в $866 млрд. Now citizens of the countries whose applications are most often rejected will undergo an accelerated check directly at the external border of the EU. For this time, they will be placed in special centers and not...

Now citizens of the countries whose applications are most often rejected will undergo an accelerated check directly at the external border of the EU. For this time, they will be placed in special centers and not...
description_uk: 🇪🇺 ЕС запускает крупнейшую реформу миграционной политики за последние годы, — DW Новые правила должны сократить поток нелегальной миграции и не допустить бесконтрольного перемещения просителей убежища по странам Евросоюза. Теперь граждане стран, чьи заявки чаще всего отклоняют, будут проходить ускоренную проверку прямо на внешней границе ЕС. На это время их разместят в специальных центрах и не...

The air attack was repelled by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, EW and unmanned systems units, mobile...

description: Russian petrochemical plants reportedly struck by Ukrainian drones hundreds of kilometers from front line. Ukraine's military reportedly carried out drone attacks on various regions overnight on June 12, striking multiple Russian petrochemical plants as far as over 1,200 kilometers (620 miles) from the Russia-Ukraine border, Russian Telegram media channels reported.

description: Ukrainian-made Neptune missile hits Russian Navy facility in Sevastopol Ukrainian military personnel struck a Russian Black Sea Fleet facility in temporarily occupied Sevastopol overnight on 10-11 June.
